programme.title: E2 - Roasted Garlic And Rosemary Prime Rib
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make an impressive holiday meal that will make your guests feel like VIPs with her recipe for roasted garlic and rosemary prime rib, which she serves with her mother's special sauce.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: After a 1,536km journey, the Earth-Cleaning Bros arrive in Olang Ol, a pristine nomadic village. They build their own ger and even try milking yaks!

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles regroupées sous un label et une identité visuelle commune et avec la même ligne éditoriale : raconter l'actualité via le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: E5 - Fun and Games with All Our Friends!
programme.desc: It's time for fun & games with all our friends! First, Jill is shy at her first mermaid swimming class, but she learns to have fun & trust herself with the help of her friends. Then, during a Mexican posada, Manny teaches Baby John how to build a piñata. After he gets over being a little scared of the blindfold, he has lots of fun! The fun continues as the friends learn to compromise when they have opposite ideas for playtime.

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E2 - Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a day of funny feelings & creative fixes! A worried Dandy brings Fiona to the garage because her lights & sirens aren't working. Gecko discovers no fix is needed because Fiona is just feeling sad inside. Then, when Blue is anxious about school because Bobby doesn't look like the bus in his book, Gecko comes up with a creative plan to let the Mechs paint Bobby! Plus, Gecko finds a creative way to deal with a swarm of bees that have nested in Trevor's engine.

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E7 - Twinkle's Bedtime Lullaby
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E1 - From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Join Gecko on his biggest adventures yet, from waterfalls to outer space! First, when Grandma's caravan rolls into a river & heads for a waterfall, Gecko must perform a daring chase to save her! Then, a lovely day at the beach becomes perilous when some vehicles get caught in the tide, requiring a helicopter rescue. The adventure blasts off as the Mechs accidentally launch their homemade spaceship to the moon & need to use solar power to get home!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to make sure Dot doesn't see her present before her birthday party. But that's easier said than done when Dot becomes an unstoppable present-hunting machine.

programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E10 - Andy And The Baby Kangaroos
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to Australia on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of why a group of kangaroos, and their joeys, are living on a beach. Along the way, Andy is chased by a pack of dingoes and hops to safety with the baby kangaroos.

programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing dress up when they hear a ghostly sound. What is going on?

programme.desc: Kisses, cuddles, and making renewable energy from cow poo! Parents are brilliant!

programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: E3 - Promises
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: E4 - Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: E18 - Apple
programme.desc: Apple sings in celebration of her great-great-grandad, Apple Tree's, 100th birthday.

programme.title: E17 - Broccoli
programme.desc: It's Broccoli and his floret, Broc, performing their phenomenal ventriloquist act.

programme.title: E2 - Speedy Pea
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: E10 - Dot Pursuit
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to make sure Dot doesn't see her present before her birthday party. But that's easier said than done when Dot becomes an unstoppable present-hunting machine.

programme.title: E1 - The Carrot Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E20 - Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E10 - Andy And The Baby Kangaroos
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to Australia on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of why a group of kangaroos, and their joeys, are living on a beach. Along the way, Andy is chased by a pack of dingoes and hops to safety with the baby kangaroos.

programme.title: E6 - Peas
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: E27 - The Spooky Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing dress up when they hear a ghostly sound. What is going on?

programme.title: E40 - Snow
programme.desc: It has snowed and almost no one can get about. Stanley builds a snow plough out of surf boards to clear the streets and makes a huge snow hill so that his friends can sledge down it.

Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: E9 - The Falquet Brothers, Snow Dreamers
programme.desc: Nicolas and Loris Falquet are at the cutting edge when it comes to freeriding. Directing and producing films about board sports, the brothers are as creative on skis as they are behind the camera. Originally from Lausanne, the brothers made Les Marecottes their playground some twenty years ago.

programme.title: E12 - Photographers From The End Of The World
programme.desc: A hundred years ago, Jacques de Thezac photographed the Bigouden region. Today, Stephane Lavoue follows in his footsteps and captures the landscapes and faces of this rugged Breton territory, thus documenting its evolution over time.

programme.title: E96
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E9 - The Falquet Brothers, Snow Dreamers
programme.desc: Nicolas and Loris Falquet are at the cutting edge when it comes to freeriding. Directing and producing films about board sports, the brothers are as creative on skis as they are behind the camera. Originally from Lausanne, the brothers made Les Marecottes their playground some twenty years ago.

programme.title: E17 - Renoir/Priscilla Royer/Chitose Abe/Aurelie Boyer
programme.desc: In Essoyes, visit the studio home of the painter Pierre-Auguste Renoir. At the heart of the 19M workshops, meet Priscilla Royer, artistic director of the iconic millinery house Maison Michel Paris. Designer Chitose Abe draws on her archives to reinvent them. Cabinetmaker Aurelie Boyer restores wooden furniture and objects.

programme.title: E2 - High Velocity
programme.desc: Amongst the vines of Lavaux, the World Tracassets Championships is a spring carnival where anything goes. The tracassets, small three-wheeled tractors, were built in the 1950s to work the steep slopes of the vineyards. To compete in the famous race, each has been meticulously customised.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.desc: A hundred years ago, Jacques de Thezac photographed the Bigouden region. Today, Stephane Lavoue follows in his footsteps and captures the landscapes and faces of this rugged Breton territory, thus documenting its evolution over time.

programme.title: E17 - Renoir/Priscilla Royer/Chitose Abe/Aurelie Boyer
programme.desc: In Essoyes, visit the studio home of the painter Pierre-Auguste Renoir. At the heart of the 19M workshops, meet Priscilla Royer, artistic director of the iconic millinery house Maison Michel Paris. Designer Chitose Abe draws on her archives to reinvent them. Cabinetmaker Aurelie Boyer restores wooden furniture and objects.

programme.title: The Wobbly Way Home
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts use balancing skills and teamwork when they have to take a shortcut home before it gets dark.

programme.title: Okefenokee Doki
programme.desc: The mosquitoes are driving Oto crazy, so he and Doki build a ‘bug trapper' device to solve the problem. To Mundi, this is wrong. What good are pesky flies and mosquitoes, anyway? Mundi makes off with the device in the plane, and hides it in Georgia's Okefenokee Swamp!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Missing Pteranodon
programme.desc: When an inflatable Pteranodon goes missing from the roof of Pizzamat, Addison and Alex are on the case to find it.

programme.title: Circuit Basics
programme.desc: Smorph's favourite robot toy has stopped working! See how an electrical circuit is made and get the robot working again.

programme.title: Big Dress Up
programme.desc: Ranger Loops gives the kids a box of old costumes, and while they're dressing up, Vik learns that his true self is what's most important.

programme.title: The Dam
programme.desc: Kit must shut down the hydroelectric plant to save Mr. Battery before he is chopped in the dam's turbine.

programme.title: Ebb's Blowy Day
programme.desc: Ebb is not happy. It's a blowy day, good for Granny's washing. She helps Flo make a kite. The kite escapes and Bird finds it. They chase Granny's flying washing and lose an oar. Towed home by Flo's kite, Ebb cheers up. Ebb's Blowy day is nearly over.

programme.title: The Parents' Day
programme.desc: On 'Bring Your Parents To School Day,' Travis, Hawk, Joy, and Astoria can't enlist their parents. Rose tries to convince her mom to return to Regal Academy, but catches the attention of Melvin, Merlin's troublemaking grandson, who challenges her to a magic duel.

programme.title: Object Throwing
programme.desc: Throw a handful of lentils on a paper sheet and draw forms without touching them.

programme.title: San Diego
programme.desc: In sunny San Diego: Beach volleyball lesson with local teens, paragliding at Torrey Pines Glider Port, flow riding at Wavehouse, and Olympic archery lessons. A week of thrilling sports and diverse experiences!

programme.title: Circuit Basics
programme.desc: Smorph's favourite robot toy has stopped working! See how an electrical circuit is made and get the robot working again.

programme.title: The Dam
programme.desc: Kit must shut down the hydroelectric plant to save Mr. Battery before he is chopped in the dam's turbine.

programme.title: Wizard School
programme.desc: Robbie and Carol are kept back after school, and alone in the classroom, come across a couple of ancient spell books. An epic battle of magic begins.

programme.title: Space Invaders
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts board the rocket ship Tuhura and explore the solar system, learning a little about each of the eight planets along the way.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Submarine
programme.desc: Henry meets a submarine dry docked at the harbour. Submarine wants to become a famous explorer and find the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: The Amazing Maze
programme.desc: After Doki tells the story of Theseus and the labyrinth, Mundi boasts about her natural sense of direction. Gabi thinks Mundi relies on her ability to fly! To prove her skill, Mundi suggests they visit a hedge maze in Cumbria, England.

programme.title: What is Pi?
programme.desc: One mathematical number that can be found everywhere is Pi. Discover the many ways in which we use pi in our calculations, and where it can be found.

programme.title: An Important Job
programme.desc: The dog of one of the Vet School's top vets has cancer and is coming in for a scan. Morgan and Amblessed are privileged to be given this job. Lauren and Saira have an excruciating wait as they test the homeless cat Finbar for a deadly disease.

programme.title: The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts go on an adventure to match a lost tooth to its owner.

programme.title: What's Over the Rainbow?
programme.desc: The rainbow we see depends on our viewpoint in relation to the sun. Red has the longest wavelength of visible light and violet has the shortest. All rainbows are actually circular, but from the ground we can normally only see the upper part of the circle.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: Kogelberg - Source To Sea
programme.desc: The youngsters set off through difficult terrain before taking on fearsome rapids. Their journey takes them through a plant kingdom filled with thousands of unique plants and animals, including an unusual sea bird that cannot fly. Can you guess what animal it might be?

programme.title: Puppy!
programme.desc: Naomi is overjoyed with her new puppy-until it mysteriously vanishes before her friends Carol and Jessi arrive. Convinced it's been stolen, she accuses everyone, but nothing adds up. Did someone really take the puppy, or is there more to the story?

programme.title: The Business Keyhole 'Conveyor Belt Sushi'
programme.desc: This program uses familiar topics from Japan and around the world as entry points to delve deep into the hidden workings of various industries. By exploring the behind‑the‑scenes side of business, it uncovers insights and ideas that can help illuminate the path toward tomorrow.

programme.title: Part 3
programme.desc: This special recap revisits the 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn, also known as Koizumi Yakumo. It portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: E3 - Nobody Likes Visiting the Dentist
programme.desc: Head into surgery with Mara the koala, who needs a life-saving tooth operation, then assess an injured sugar glider with vet Tim. Cheer as rescue officer Elise pulls a flying fox out of a gutter and see nurse Bree’s clutch of python eggs hatch.

programme.title: E3 - In the Extreme
programme.desc: Follow a host of sharks with extraordinary abilities that allow them to thrive in the most adverse conditions around the globe. Observe nearly blind Greenland sharks made for life in freezing Arctic waters, and another species that can walk on land.

programme.title: E1 - Leaping Into Life
programme.desc: It’s spring, and the farm is bursting with new life. Watch a ewe give birth to twins, an orphaned Hereford calf struggle to find a surrogate mother, and the top hen nestle down in her maternity coop.

programme.title: E2 - Great Escape
programme.desc: Experience life on the farm as things heat up for summer. Watch animals swelter in a rare heatwave, try to stay cool in the nearby freshwater stream, and stash supplies for fall.

programme.title: E5 - Etosha: The Great White Place
programme.desc: Etosha was once a great lake that dried up and now only fills with water seasonally during the summer rains. Once the Etosha pan is full of water, a myriad of water birds congregate in the shallow lake to breed, most notably Greater and lesser flamingos.

programme.title: E2 - Snake Face Off
programme.desc: Launch into spring’s snake surge with Liv and Stu, who intercept two male brown snakes duelling for mating rights at a construction site. Stand back as Dan and Jess rescue chickens from a python, and Mick and Adele hunt for a rogue green tree snake.

programme.title: E1 - The Domino Effect
programme.desc: Witness some big changes when four cute new arrivals join the nursery classes. And for a handful of adolescent males that are growing too big and boisterous for their babysitters, it’s their last day at forest school.

programme.title: E204 - Beast Girl/Tv Knight 3/Bro-Pocalypse/Flashback: Pt 1/Flashback: Pt 2
programme.desc: As the Titans deal with Madame Rouge, Beast Boy is excited to meet his female counterpart Beast Girl.

programme.title: E125 - Locked In Space
programme.desc: When the spies are framed and sent to Space Jail, they must escape back to Earth using Toby’s help to prove their innocence. But they unknowingly bring back an evil stowaway who can conjure up thunder and lightning, causing a major storm for WOOHP.

programme.title: E127 - Wish Bone/Going Going Gone Viral/The Tortoise Don't Play Fair/Fish Out Of Water/Cat M
programme.desc: Butch finds a wish bone in the garbage and dupes Tom.

programme.title: E74 - The Romantic/The Uploads/The Wicked/The Origins - Pt 1/The Origins - Pt 2
programme.desc: After Gumball convinces himself that Penny doesn't love him as much as she used to, he decides to put together a romantic quest to remind her of all the good times they've had together. But Gumball's romantic gesture backfires, landing Penny - and maybe their relationship - in serious peril.

programme.title: E167 - The Buddy/The Master/The Silence/The Future/The Wish
programme.desc: Anais and school psycho Jamie are accused of the same techno-crime. They are forced to team up to discover the real culprit in order to prove their innocence. After solving the case, they realise that they have more in common than they thought...

programme.title: E1110 - I'm The Sauce/Accept The Next Proposition You Hear/Hey You, Don't Forget About Me In
programme.desc: Stuck inside because of bad weather, the Titans play rainy day games after Robin convinces them that indoor activities will cheer up the clouds and make the rain stop.

programme.title: E125 - Room For Ruby/Lion 4: Alternate Ending/Doug Out
programme.desc: Steven's Gem family continues to grow.

programme.title: E209 - The Scoop/Chicken In The Cradle/Kabooms Pt 1/Kabooms Pt 2/Tower Renovation
programme.desc: When Starfire becomes obsessed with an ice cream scoop, the others try to teach her that inanimate objects can't replace people.

programme.title: E437 - Autograph Hunter/The Sofa Stain/Bean The Pet Groomer/Double Date Disaster/Table Tenni
programme.desc: Mr Bean is desperate to get an autograph from his favourite action star, but the queue is huge!

programme.title: E1 - The Power/But I Have A Receipt/Gut Model/Fool Me Twice/Bachelor Party! Zingo!!
programme.desc: Rigby steals a magic keyboard from a preoccupied sorcerer. When Mordecai and Rigby accidentally make a hole in the wall while wrestling a stuffed animal, they use the keyboard to make Pops and Benson give them raises to try to pay for it.

programme.title: E9 - Avoidance
programme.desc: Doc has a strong fear of learning about the secret of his past; Giula is left to look after a patient who appears to be hiding something; Enrico must deal with Barbara's assaults, which might be more than just infatuation.

programme.title: E91
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: E92
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: E92

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Identical twins – a musician living in New York, and a mechanic living in Hong Kong – are separated in childhood but are unexpectedly reunited years later when the musician travels to Hong Kong for a concert.

programme.title: E98
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Six more incognito celebrity singers take to the stage. Air Fryer takes on Bubble Tea, Owl faces Eiffel Tower and Chicken Caesar goes up against Piranha. One of them will be unmasked at the end of the show.

The Magic Of Colors
programme.desc: Colors make our homes more beautiful. They make our clothes more stylish. And colors are indispensable for art. But what looks beautiful can also be toxic: Many colors contain substances like mercury, lead, or chromium.

programme.title: Axolotl - The Magical Healing Powers Of A Salamander

The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: The Specialist
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Sharon Stone star in this hard-edged thriller about an ex-CIA explosives expert (Stallone) who helps a seductive beauty (Stone) avenge the murder of her parents by a powerful Cuban-American crime boss.

programme.title: The Chronicles Of Riddick
programme.desc: The wanted criminal Richard Bruno Riddick arrives on a planet called Helion Prime and finds himself up against an invading empire called the Necromongers, an army that plans to convert or kill all humans in the universe.

Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: E2 - The Jonathan Gold Standard
programme.desc: This week the chefs honor the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. Using Gold’s last guide list, the chefs fan out all over Los Angeles to sample the unique taquerias, food trucks, mom-and-pop cafes, upscale eateries and ethnic cuisine only found in the City of Angels. Drawing inspiration from this one-in-a-lifetime culinary odyssey, the chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold’s friends, family, and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station. Noted food writer and personal friend of Jonathan Gold, Ruth Reichl serves as guest judge alongside Padma, Tom and Gail.

programme.title: E8 - Rustbucket Rip
programme.desc: During a tour of historic Oldeville, Ben finds a rare Sumo Slammers card. When Billy Billions claims the same card, Ben has to battle Billy's high-tech drones which have hijacked the Rust Bucket!

programme.title: E8 - Sing Beans
programme.desc: In order to cook the performing food Sing Beans, the gang has to stay up all night as the dish cooks.

programme.title: E9 - Grubble Gum
programme.desc: Chowder is forced to swallow his new gum before Truffles finds out he didn't buy enough to share. Soon all of Marzipan City ends up in a very sticky situation.

programme.title: E3 - Strokes Of Genius
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration from one of four historical art movements to create a masterpiece on their plate. Guest Judge Ludo Lefebvre joins Tom, Padma and Gail, as well as guest diners Chefs Ray Garcia, Sara Hymanson, Sarah Kramer and Craig Thornton.

programme.title: E7 - Laser vs. Super Epoxy

programme.title: E1 - Mexico
programme.desc: On a wild and dangerous adventure to Mexico, BMX bikers Rooftop and Catfish test how gutsy they really are. The pair go from racing bikes to racing donkeys, flame throwing and tricking in pointy shoes on the streets, to loosing their breakfast trying to eat eyeball tacos for lunch. But the duo’s bravery (or stupidity) doesn’t end there. They compete in a rodeo, milk a snake for its venom, spin upside down as Voladores in a traditional rain ceremony, and get tattoos right before diving into the city’s toxic sewage. With all of these dauntless activities the question becomes, can Rooftop and Catfish make it out of Mexico in one piece?

programme.desc: Episode 107 of Showdown of the Unbeatables features Adapt Laser versus the Chemsol Randogrip supercoating; JetCat engine versus the Jet-O-Vator personal watercraft; and Power Post Driver versus the Baker Ballistics riot shield.

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E104
programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.title: E89
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.title: E5151
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: The Dead Dumpster
programme.desc: Gang of friends who never thought to do any good things, get luck by winning lotto. They bring all money to casino with hope it will be increased but get a huge debt instead. They decide to rob a car without knowing that there is a dead body inside. Their mission turns into 2, escape from police as suspected murderers and they have to get away from owner of the casino.

programme.title: Wolf Hiding
programme.desc: Amid the transfer of power at the Hongtai Group, which wields influence in both the lawful and unlawful worlds, a mysterious assassin named Chen An suddenly enters this vortex of confusion and throws the Hongtai Group into chaos. Mai Longwen from the police and Ma Wenkang from the gangs both have their eyes on him... Various forces are waiting for the opportunity to strike. Who is the mastermind behind the scenes? A fierce battle is about to break out.

programme.title: Pa Pa Loves You
programme.desc: Ying is a single parent who's having a tough time disciplining his wild teenage daughter Ellen. When Ying is mistaken to be the famous gangster hero 'Shadowless Eagle', he gains both recognition and popularity among Ellen's gangster classmates, and she begins to gain new respect for her father. But Ying's legend becomes more than he can handle when some real triad members come seeking revenge.

programme.title: Shanghai Grand
programme.desc: The Taiwan military officer, Hsu falls into the enemy's ambush, and floats to the Shanghai shore where he is saved by Ting Lik. Lik teams up with Kueng to try to make a fortune and soon they become famous in Shanghai. The Shanghai tycoon Fung try to eliminate other opponents with the help of Hsu and Lik. Later, Hsu discovers Fung is the mastermind of the ambush that killed all his fellow officials...

programme.title: Warrior Mothers: Who Is The Craftiest
programme.desc: Leung Piu a swindler, cheats Yue Nan out of his life savings. This leads to Yue Nan's death, leaving his daughter Winnie behind. The Kang family, long disgusted by Leung's treachery, vow to avenge Yue Nan. They decide to “fight deceit with deceit”, exploiting Leung's greed to lure him into a trap, but Leung outsmarts Kang family. As the conflict escalates, Leung continuously sows discord between Kang's brothers Mon and Chuen. When Leung believes he has triumphed by triggering infighting within Kang family...

programme.title: The Seven Angels
programme.desc: In an unprecedented and sensational move, the police force dismisses seven policewomen simultaneously. They are The Flirt, Diety, Gold-digger, Sherry Holmes, Sixfooter Plus, Plump and Sgt. Crab-pincers. In fact, they are all assigned to a case to catch a sex fiend who has already murdered four night club hostesses. The seven girls work at the biggest night club Crime City Club after training. A promotional gimmick launches: prize for the team of hostesses with the most votes from customers. QE's team jumps to the lead and has a good laugh at the former policewomen. Crab-pincers is angered. Putting aside their assignment, she and her girls go to war to win customers and votes. At the same time, a sex magazine photographer Big John, who happens to be QE's brother, invites The Flirt to a photo session...

programme.title: Shanghai Grand
programme.desc: The Taiwan military officer, Hsu falls into the enemy's ambush, and floats to the Shanghai shore where he is saved by Ting Lik. Lik teams up with Kueng to try to make a fortune and soon they become famous in Shanghai. The Shanghai tycoon Fung try to eliminate other opponents with the help of Hsu and Lik. Later, Hsu discovers Fung is the mastermind of the ambush that killed all his fellow officials...

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

E3
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。
